title: Masco
description: The Masco is a clean pack used for manly Bedwars,PvP, its colored Blue because it's my favorite color, it works great for anything to building to pvp, I believe you will like this pack, well have a good day and goodbye o/. And also if you don't mine can.
body: The Masco Pack is a clean pack used for manly Pvp, its colored Blue because it's my favorite color, it works great for anything to building to pvp, I believe you will like this pack, well have a good day and goodbye o/. And also if you don't mine can you sub to my YouTube channel? I post Shorts every day there, so if you want a good laugh come to my youtube channel, Thanks.
